overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian industrial waterfront district at dusk. The scene features heavy industrial architecture with massive pipes, metal walkways, and storage tanks, populated by scattered pedestrians and bathed in warm sunset light mixed with artificial neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront walkway with overhead pipe structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along industrial sidewalk beneath massive metal pipe structures and ventilation systems

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and glowing blue visor walks past the camera

entered.detail: large industrial ventilation grate structure with horizontal slats
elevated metal walkway connecting industrial buildings with glowing lights underneath
dark industrial facade with illuminated windows
tall smokestack emitting white smoke against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person walk along a concrete sidewalk in a heavy industrial district. Massive metal ventilation structures line the left side while overhead pipe bridges span the walkway. A pedestrian with distinctive red hair and a glowing visor passes by closely. The warm dusk light creates long shadows from the industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street approaching intersection with storage tanks

events.description: ego transitions from concrete sidewalk onto the asphalt street surface
crowd density increases significantly as approaching the industrial intersection

agents.ego_description: moving from the sidewalk onto the street and approaching a gathering of pedestrians near the intersection

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial storage tanks with metallic surfaces
glowing red digital advertisement screen on building facade
massive curved concrete and metal overpass structure spanning the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The ego moves from the sidewalk onto the asphalt street, approaching a busy industrial intersection. Large cylindrical storage tanks become visible on the right, alongside a glowing red digital billboard. The massive curved overpass structure dominates the view ahead as crowd density increases around the intersection area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection beneath curved overpass with dense pedestrian activity

events.description: ego makes a right turn at the intersection to proceed under the overpass
moving from open intersection into covered underpass area with storage tanks

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dense crowd of pedestrians and turning right to pass under the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: worker in orange hard hat and reflective vest walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete pillar supporting the curved overpass structure
painted yellow curb marking the sidewalk edge
large white cylindrical tanks with blue horizontal stripes and hazard symbols
yellow triangular warning signs on the storage tanks

segments.scene_description: The ego turns right at the busy intersection, moving beneath the massive curved overpass. Large cylindrical storage tanks with hazard warnings line the right side. The crowd density is high as pedestrians cross in various directions. The camera passes under the overpass structure, transitioning into a more enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass leading to open waterfront with distant mountains

events.description: ambient light drops significantly as entering deep shadow beneath the overpass
approaching open waterfront area with visible horizon line and distant mountain range

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass toward the open waterfront, leaving the dense crowd behind

notable_agents.action: solitary figure standing at the end of the road near the waterfront horizon

entered.detail: open view of water and sky at the end of the industrial road
distant mountain range visible against the dusk sky
thick bundle of electrical cables stretching across the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a dimly lit industrial underpass with large storage tanks receding into the mid-ground. The lighting shifts to low-light as the overpass blocks the sunset. Ahead, the road opens to a waterfront view with distant mountains silhouetted against the dusk sky. A solitary figure stands at the horizon where the industrial zone meets the open water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense industrial district that transitions from an open, sun-drenched sidewalk into a shadowed underpass overlooking a distant waterfront. It begins with a walk along a concrete path lined with massive ventilation structures and overhead pipe bridges, passing a pedestrian with a glowing visor under the warm light of dusk. As the camera moves from the sidewalk onto the asphalt street, the view expands to reveal large cylindrical storage tanks and a glowing red digital billboard before approaching a crowded intersection dominated by a massive curved overpass. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right and passes beneath the heavy concrete structure, where the crowd density peaks and the sunset is blocked by the architecture. Finally, the movement leads through the dimly lit underpass toward an opening in the industrial zone, revealing a silhouette of mountains and a solitary figure standing against the open water of the horizon.
